svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="监控体系架构" id="monitor-arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="-549" dy="-190" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="监控体系全链路架构" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="300" x="350" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="前端监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="170" x="60" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FEg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="前端监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" x="40" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FE1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="Sentry
Vue3/Nuxt3 运行时错误监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="196" x="52" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FE2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="Web Vitals
性能指标 FCP/LCP/CLS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="196" x="52" y="236" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BFF" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="BFF层监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="170" x="320" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BFFg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="BFF层监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" x="300" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BFF1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="Prometheus + Grafana
接口性能监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="196" x="312" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BFF2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="ELK
Egg.js/Express 运行日志" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="196" x="312" y="236" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GW" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="网关层监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="170" x="580" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GWg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="网关层监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" x="560" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GW1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="Nginx 日志分析
流量、访问量监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="196" x="572" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GW2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="WAF 日志
安全攻击监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="196" x="572" y="236" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="后端监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="170" x="840" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BEg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="后端监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="180" x="820" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BE1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="SpringBoot Actuator
服务状态 / JVM 监控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="156" x="832" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BE2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="Prometheus
接口成功率/响应时间" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="156" x="832" y="236" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Center" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="监控中心

数据聚合与分析
异常阈值判断" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="280" x="380" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Alert" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="告警通知

邮件告警
钉钉 / 企业微信告警" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="280" x="380" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eFE" edge="1" parent="1" source="FE" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.15;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Center" value="数据上报"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eBFF" edge="1" parent="1" source="BFF" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.4;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Center" value="数据上报"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eGW" edge="1" parent="1" source="GW" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.6;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Center" value="数据上报"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eBE" edge="1" parent="1" source="BE" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.85;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Center" value="数据上报"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eCA" edge="1" parent="1" source="Center" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.8;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="Alert" value="异常告警"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
